name: Restored Nanoforge
desc:
A powerful and versatile manufacturing "black box", capable of building itself out to an industrial scale, given the necessary raw materials and human assistance.

This one was formerly corruped, but has been thoroughly, but not fully, restored by the Bultach Coalition. To bolster their military might, and in pursuit of aquiring defect-free starship components, this nanoforge forgoes any increased production as well as increasing the resources demanded, but indeed allows for lessened defects.
